001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.historyLog;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.HistoryLogProps;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006
007@HistoryLogProps(
008    opCode = 395,
009    displayName = "CGM Pairing Code G7",
010    internalName = "LID_CGM_PAIRING_CODE_G7"
011)
012public class CgmPairingCodeG7HistoryLog extends HistoryLog {
013
014    private String pairingCode;
015
016    public CgmPairingCodeG7HistoryLog() {}
017    public CgmPairingCodeG7HistoryLog(long pumpTimeSec, long sequenceNum, String pairingCode) {
018        super(pumpTimeSec, sequenceNum);
019        this.cargo = buildCargo(pumpTimeSec, sequenceNum, pairingCode);
020        this.pairingCode = pairingCode;
021
022    }
023
024    public CgmPairingCodeG7HistoryLog(String pairingCode) {
025        this(0, 0, pairingCode);
026    }
027
028    public int typeId() {
029        return 395;
030    }
031
032    /**
033     * <table border="1">
034     * <caption>Parsed fields for CgmPairingCodeG7HistoryLog:</caption>
035     * <tr><td><code>pairingCode</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readString(raw, 10, 16)</code></td></tr>
036     * </table>
037     */
038    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
039        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == 26);
040        this.cargo = raw;
041        parseBase(raw);
042        this.pairingCode = Bytes.readString(raw, 10, 16);
043
044    }
045
046    public static byte[] buildCargo(long pumpTimeSec, long sequenceNum, String pairingCode) {
047        return HistoryLog.fillCargo(Bytes.combine(
048            new byte[]{(byte)(395 & 0xFF), (byte)(395 >> 8)},
049            Bytes.toUint32(pumpTimeSec),
050            Bytes.toUint32(sequenceNum),
051            Bytes.writeString(pairingCode, 16)));
052    }
053
054    public String getPairingCode() {
055        return pairingCode;
056    }
057
058}
